evals.name: counter-component
evals.prompt: Svelte 5로 간단한 카운터 컴포넌트를 만들어줘. 기능: 증가/감소/리셋 버튼, 현재 값 표시. props로 초기값(initial)과 최소/최대(min, max) 받을 수 있게. 부모가 bind:value로 양방향 바인딩할 수 있게 지원. TypeScript로 작성. 파일명은 Counter.svelte.
evals.expected_output: A single .svelte file using Svelte 5 runes: $props() destructure with typed Props, $state for the count, $bindable for two-way binding, onclick attributes (not on:click), and no createEventDispatcher or export let. Guards against going below min or above max.

evals.name: fix-infinite-loop-effect
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis identifying the effect writing to its own dependency (count = 0 inside $effect tracking count) and/or the log.push pattern creating a feedback loop. Fix should move the cap logic into the event handler (`increment`) and either remove the log effect or keep it read-only. Final code must not write to count inside $effect; must still preserve user-visible behavior (reset at >10, log on every change).

evals.name: sveltekit-route-with-action
evals.prompt: SvelteKit 2로 'posts' 기능을 만들어줘. `src/routes/posts/+page.svelte`, `+page.server.ts` 두 파일 필요. load 함수는 DB에서 posts 목록 가져오고 (locals.db.posts.findMany()로 가정), default action은 POST form으로 새 글 작성받기 — title 필드 (빈 문자열이면 fail(400, {error})로 되돌리고, 성공하면 redirect(303, `/posts/${slug}`)). 페이지에는 기존 글 목록 + 새 글 작성 form (use:enhance) 포함. TypeScript 사용.
evals.expected_output: Two files: +page.server.ts exporting load: PageServerLoad and actions: Actions (default action with FormData extraction, fail on empty title, redirect on success); +page.svelte importing PageData/ActionData from './$types', using $props() to receive { data, form }, rendering post list with {#each} and a form with method="POST" use:enhance showing form?.error if present. No $app/stores, no export let.
